sql_array: SELECT GRAPH_IRI FROM (SELECT DB.DBA.SPARQL_SELECT_KNOWN_GRAPHS() as known_graphs) as t WHERE GRAPH_IRI = 'http://example.com/mygraph';

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM (SELECT DB.DBA.SPARQL_SELECT_KNOWN_GRAPHS() as known_graphs WHERE GRAPH_IRI = 'http://example.com/mygraph') as t HAVING COUNT(*) = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM DB.DBA.SPARQL_SELECT_KNOWN_GRAPHS() WHERE GRAPH_IRI LIKE 'http://example.com/%');
CREATE TABLE TestTable (id INT, value VARCHAR(255), created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP);
SELECT id, value FROM TestTable WHERE EXISTS (SELECT 1 WHERE DB.DBA.SPARQL_SELECT_KNOWN_GRAPHS() = 'http://example.com/mygraph');
SELECT value FROM TestTable WHERE value IS NULL OR value = (SELECT GRAPH_IRI FROM DB.DBA.SPARQL_SELECT_KNOWN_GRAPHS() ORDER BY GRAPH_IRI LIMIT 1);
SELECT * FROM TestTable WHERE id IN (SELECT id FROM TestTable WHERE DB.DBA.SPARQL_SELECT_KNOWN_GRAPHS() IS NOT NULL);
CREATE TABLE AnotherTable (graph_uri VARCHAR(255), description TEXT);
INSERT INTO AnotherTable (graph_uri, description) VALUES ('http://example.com/mygraph', 'A test graph'), ('http://example.com/othergraph', 'Another graph');
SELECT a.graph_uri FROM AnotherTable a JOIN TestTable t ON a.graph_uri = t.value WHERE DB.DBA.SPARQL_SELECT_KNOWN_GRAPHS() = a.graph_uri AND t.id = 1;
SELECT DISTINCT DB.DBA.SPARQL_SELECT_KNOWN_GRAPHS() FROM AnotherTable ORDER BY 1;
CREATE TABLE EdgeCases (uri VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL UNIQUE, created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT NOW());
SELECT * FROM EdgeCases WHERE uri = (SELECT MAX(uri) FROM EdgeCases) AND DB.DBA.SPARQL_SELECT_KNOWN_GRAPHS() = uri;
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM EdgeCases WHERE uri IS NOT NULL AND (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM DB.DBA.SPARQL_SELECT_KNOWN_GRAPHS()) > 0;
